Partnership Excellence

The Opulent Vault Circle Affiliate Programme.

Unlock a world of unparalleled luxury. Partner with the global leader in bespoke high-end services and earn elite commissions while providing your audience with access to the extraordinary.

Join the Programme
Overview

Elevating the Art of Referral.

The Opulent Vault Circle is more than an affiliate program; it is a curated network of tastemakers, luxury consultants, and digital creators. We provide the tools and the pedigree to help you monetise your influence within the ultra-high-net-worth demographic.

verified_userExclusive brand association
verified_userDedicated partner management
verified_userAccess to VIP assets and content

12%

Average Commission

Benefits

Unrivaled Rewards for Quality.

payments

Competitive Commissions

Earn high-percentage commissions on every luxury stay, flight, and concierge service booked through your unique link.

query_stats

Real-Time Tracking

Access our proprietary dashboard to monitor clicks, conversions, and earnings with surgical precision and live updates.

calendar_month

90-Day Cookie Window

Luxury decisions take time. We offer an extended attribution window to ensure you get credited for long-term considerations.

Commission Structure

Three Tiers of Excellence

Bronze
8%

0 - 5 referrals/month

  • check_smallDedicated link
  • check_smallMonthly payouts
  • check_smallMarketing kit
Silver
12%

6 - 15 referrals/month

  • check_smallEverything in Bronze
  • check_smallPriority support
  • check_small90-day cookie
  • check_smallQuarterly bonus
Gold
18%

16+ referrals/month

  • check_smallEverything in Silver
  • check_smallPersonal account manager
  • check_smallVIP event invitations
  • check_smallBespoke commission structures

FAQ

Common Questions

AI-Powered, Human-Perfected

Your Personal Concierge,
Always On.

The Opulent Vault AI Concierge anticipates your needs before you even voice them. From property recommendations and private jet charters to bespoke experiences and 24/7 booking support — intelligence at your fingertips, luxury at every step.

  • check_smallInstant property recommendations tailored to your taste
  • check_smallPrivate aviation and helicopter transfer requests
  • check_smallCurated dining, spa, and experience bookings
  • check_smallRound-the-clock concierge and booking support
auto_awesome

OPV AI Concierge

Online

“Good evening. I have a preference for high-floor penthouses with panoramic city views in London this weekend. Can you arrange a private transfer from Heathrow as well?”

Certainly. I've identified three exceptional penthouses available this weekend — The Shard Residence, One Hyde Park, and The OPV Mayfair Suite. I've also reserved a Rolls-Royce Phantom for your Heathrow collection at 18:30. Shall I proceed?

Opulent Vault is Manchester's curated luxury lifestyle concierge marketplace.
